reviews.comment:
Todo bien. Realice el pedido. Perfecto. Me lo alcanzaron a la mesa. No avisaron que cerraban ni nada. Eran las 21,30hs. Pero empezaron a levantar las sillas sobre las mesas de.alrededor. y me comi rapido y me fuí.

(Translated by Google)
Everything was fine. I placed the order. Perfect. They brought it to my table. They didn't announce they were closing or anything. It was 9:30 pm. But they started lifting chairs onto the surrounding tables, so I ate quickly and left.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQyMi0zeWF3EAE
